meta.title: GCB Lite — Try in your browser
meta.description: A live WordPress install in your browser with the gcb-lite plugin, the GCB Saas demo theme, and a fully composed home page. Edit any block to see the typed-field Inspector on the right.
meta.author: wordpress-gcb

options.blogdescription: Typed Gutenberg blocks rendered as React. File-based schemas. No UI authoring.

steps.code:
$post_type, 'meta_key' => '_gcblite_seed_marker', 'meta_value' => $marker, 'post_status' => 'any', 'numberposts' => 1, ]); if ($existing) { wp_update_post(array_merge(['ID' => $existing[0]->ID], $data)); $id = $existing[0]->ID; } else { $id = wp_insert_post(array_merge($data, ['post_type' => $post_type, 'post_status' => 'publish'])); update_post_meta($id, '_gcblite_seed_marker', $marker); } foreach ($meta as $k => $v) update_post_meta($id, $k, $v); return $id; } $base = get_stylesheet_directory_uri() . '/assets/images'; foreach ([ ['Postwave CMS Marketing', 'SaaS site', 'project-1.png', 'https://postwave.example'], ['Beacon Analytics Dashboard','Web app', 'project-4.png', 'https://beacon.example'], ['Glide Editorial', 'Publishing', 'project-2.png', 'https://glide.example'], ] as $p) { list($t, $cat, $img, $u) = $p; gcb_pg_upsert('project', 'project:' . sanitize_title($t), ['post_title' => $t, 'post_excerpt' => 'Shipped end-to-end on GCB.'], [ 'cover' => ['url' => $base . '/project/' . $img, 'alt' => $t, 'width' => 800, 'height' => 500], 'live_url' => ['url' => $u, 'text' => 'Visit site', 'opensInNewTab' => true], ] ); } foreach ([ ['Maya Hernandez', 'Senior Frontend Engineer', 'Postwave', 'Editor preview and the live site are the same React component.'], ['Jordan Ito', 'Editor-in-Chief', 'Glide', 'My editors author in Gutenberg, our frontend is Next.js.'], ['Sam Okafor', 'Tech Lead', 'Beacon', 'The typed field system is what hooked me.'], ] as $t) { list($name, $role, $from, $q) = $t; gcb_pg_upsert('testimonial', 'testimonial:' . sanitize_title($name), ['post_title' => $name], [ 'quote' => '“' . $q . '”', 'author_name' => $name, 'author_role' => $role, 'author_image' => ['url' => 'https://i.pravatar.cc/120?u=' . sanitize_title($name), 'alt' => $name], 'from_label' => $from, ] ); } foreach (['Postwave', 'Beacon', 'Glide', 'Northwind', 'Helio', 'Atlas'] as $b) { gcb_pg_upsert('brand', 'brand:' . sanitize_title($b), ['post_title' => $b], ['logo' => ['url' => 'https://dummyimage.com/200x60/202020/ffffff&text=' . urlencode($b), 'alt' => $b, 'width' => 200, 'height' => 60]] ); } $home_content = "\n

One JSON file defines your fields. 30+ premium controls render natively in the Inspector — image focal points, galleries, repeaters, post relationships, conditional logic.

\n

Go headless: write one React component, get pixel-perfect 1:1 previews in wp-admin and on your public site. Or render in PHP if React's overkill. Your choice, per block.

\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n"; kses_remove_filters(); $home_id = gcb_pg_upsert('page', 'home-page', [ 'post_title' => 'Home', 'post_name' => 'home', 'post_content' => $home_content, ]); // Seed a couple of categories + a sample blog post so the reference // fields (post-object / page-link / taxonomy / user / relationship) // have something real to point at on the all-fields demo page. $sample_post_id = gcb_pg_upsert('post', 'all-fields-sample-post', [ 'post_title' => 'Sample post for reference fields', 'post_name' => 'sample-post', 'post_content' => '

Used by the all-fields showcase to demonstrate the post-object and relationship controls.

', ]); $cat_a = wp_create_category('Editorial'); $cat_b = wp_create_category('Engineering'); if (!is_wp_error($cat_a) && !is_wp_error($cat_b)) { wp_set_post_categories($sample_post_id, [$cat_a, $cat_b]); } $admin_user = get_user_by('login', 'admin'); $admin_user_id = $admin_user ? $admin_user->ID : 1; // All-fields demo page — single field-showcase block. Most defaults // come from block.fields.json; the media + reference fields need // runtime-resolved URLs / ids, so we seed those into block attrs here. $showcase_attrs = [ 'image_field' => ['url' => $base . '/project/project-3.png', 'alt' => 'Sample image', 'width' => 800, 'height' => 500, 'focalPoint' => ['x' => 0.5, 'y' => 0.35], 'size' => 'cover', 'customWidth' => ''], 'gallery_field' => [ ['id' => 1, 'url' => $base . '/project/project-1.png', 'alt' => 'Tile 1', 'width' => 800, 'height' => 500], ['id' => 2, 'url' => $base . '/project/project-2.png', 'alt' => 'Tile 2', 'width' => 800, 'height' => 500], ['id' => 3, 'url' => $base . '/project/project-4.png', 'alt' => 'Tile 3', 'width' => 800, 'height' => 500], ['id' => 4, 'url' => $base . '/project/project-5.png', 'alt' => 'Tile 4', 'width' => 800, 'height' => 500], ], 'file_field' => ['url' => $base . '/project/mobile-mockup.png', 'filename' => 'mobile-mockup.png', 'title' => 'Mobile mockup'], 'google_map_field' => ['lat' => -33.8688, 'lng' => 151.2093, 'zoom' => 12, 'address' => 'Sydney, NSW'], 'post_object_field' => $sample_post_id, 'page_link_field' => $home_id, 'taxonomy_field' => [(int) $cat_a, (int) $cat_b], 'user_field' => $admin_user_id, 'relationship_field' => [$sample_post_id], ]; $showcase_json = wp_json_encode($showcase_attrs); gcb_pg_upsert('page', 'all-fields-page', [ 'post_title' => 'All fields', 'post_name' => 'all-fields', 'post_content' => '', ]); kses_init_filters(); // Pin the home page to '/'. Without this WP serves the blog index for / // and falls through to index.php (the theme's old placeholder text). update_option('show_on_front', 'page'); update_option('page_on_front', $home_id);
